---
title: "Online Retail Dashboard"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    theme: bootstrap 
    source: embed
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)

library(rmarkdown)
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggplot2) 
library(plotly) 
library(dplyr) 
library(readr) 
library(scales) 
library(shiny)

#Import Hive query results
kpi <- read.csv("kpi.csv") 
monthly_revenue <- read.csv("monthly_revenue.csv") 
monthly_orders <- read.csv("monthly_orders.csv") 
top_products_revenue <- read.csv("top_products_revenue.csv") 
top_products_quantity <- read.csv("top_products_quantity.csv") 
top_customers <- read.csv("top_customers.csv") 
country_revenue <- read.csv("country_revenue.csv")

#Colour palette 
navy <- "#1B3A5C"       
blue <- "#2E6DA4"        
teal <- "#2E8B74"        
gold <- "#C68A1F"        
coral <- "#C1443D"       
light_blue <- "#7FB0D9"  
grey <- "#555555" 
light_grey <- "#F5F7F9"

# Plotly font 
plot_font <- list( family = "Arial", size = 12, color = grey )
```

Row {data-height=160}
-------------------------------------------------------------

### Total Revenue

```{r}
valueBox(value = paste0("£",round(kpi$total_revenue[1] / 1000000, 2), "M"),
  caption = "Total Revenue",icon = "fa-money",color = navy)
```

### Total Orders

```{r}
valueBox(value = comma(kpi$total_orders[1]),caption = "Total Orders",
         icon = "fa-shopping-cart", color = blue)
```

### Total Customers

```{r}
valueBox(value = comma(kpi$total_customers[1]), caption = "Total Customers",
         icon = "fa-users", color = teal)
```

### Total Products

```{r}
valueBox(value = comma(kpi$total_products[1]), caption = "Total Products",
         icon = "fa-cubes", color = gold)
```

### Average Order Value

```{r}
valueBox(value = paste0("£", format(round(kpi$average_order_value[1], 2),
                                    big.mark = ",", nsmall = 2)),
         caption = "Average Order Value", icon = "fa-credit-card",
         color = coral)
```

Row {data-height=500}
-------------------------------------------------------------

### Monthly Revenue Trend

```{r}
plot_ly(monthly_revenue, x = ~year_month, y = ~monthly_revenue,
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",  fill = "tozeroy",
        fillcolor = "rgba(79,129,164,0.25)",line = list(color = blue,width = 3),
        marker = list(size = 7),
        text = ~paste0("<b>Month:</b> ", year_month,"<br><b>Revenue:</b> £",
                       format(round(monthly_revenue, 2), big.mark = ",")),
        hoverinfo = "text", showlegend = FALSE) %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
         title = list(text = "<b>Monthly Revenue Trend</b>",x = 0.5),
         xaxis = list(title = "Month",tickangle = -45),
         yaxis = list(title = "Revenue (£)",tickformat = ",.0f", 
                      showgrid = FALSE, gridcolor = light_grey),
         font = plot_font, margin = list(l = 80, r = 30, t = 70, b = 90))
```

### Top Products by Revenue

```{r}
product_revenue_plot <- top_products_revenue %>%arrange(total_revenue)

plot_ly(product_revenue_plot, x=~total_revenue, 
        y=~reorder(description, total_revenue), type = "bar", orientation = "h", 
        marker = list(color = navy, line = list(color = "white", width = 1)),
        text = ~paste0("<b>Product:</b> ", 
                       description, "<br><b>Stock code:</b> ", 
                       stock_code, "<br><b>Revenue:</b> £",
                       format(round(total_revenue, 2),big.mark = ",")),
        hoverinfo = "text", textposition = "none", showlegend = FALSE) %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
         title = list(text = "<b>Top Products by Revenue</b>", x = 0.5),
         xaxis = list(title = "Revenue (£)",tickformat = ",.0f", 
                      showgrid = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(title = "", automargin = TRUE, gridcolor = light_grey),
         font = plot_font, margin = list(l = 230, r = 30, t = 70, b = 60))
```

Row {data-height=500}
-------------------------------------------------------------

### Monthly Order Trend

```{r}
plot_ly(monthly_orders, x = ~year_month, y = ~total_orders, type = "scatter",
        mode = "lines+markers", fill = "tozeroy", 
        fillcolor = "rgba(214,168,75,0.25)", line = list(color=gold,width = 3),
        marker = list(size = 7, color = gold),
        text = ~paste0("<b>Month:</b> ", year_month,"<br><b>Total orders:</b> ",
                       format(total_orders, big.mark = ",")),
        hoverinfo = "text", showlegend = FALSE) %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
         title = list(text = "<b>Monthly Order Trend</b>", x = 0.5),
         xaxis = list(title = "Month", tickangle = -45, showgrid = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(title = "Number of Orders", tickformat = ",.0f", 
                      gridcolor = light_grey), font = plot_font,
         margin = list(l = 70, r = 30,t = 70, b = 90))
```

### Top Products by Quantity Sold

```{r}
product_quantity_plot <- top_products_quantity %>% arrange(total_quantity)

plot_ly(product_quantity_plot, x = ~total_quantity,
        y = ~reorder(description, total_quantity),
        type = "bar", orientation = "h",
        marker = list(color = teal, line = list(color = "white", width = 1)),
        text = ~paste0("<b>Product:</b> ", description,
                       "<br><b>Stock code:</b> ", stock_code,
                       "<br><b>Quantity sold:</b> ", 
                       format(total_quantity, big.mark = ",")),
        hoverinfo = "text", textposition = "none", showlegend = FALSE) %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
         title = list(text = "<b>Top Products by Quantity Sold</b>",x = 0.5),
         xaxis = list(title = "Quantity Sold", tickformat = ",.0f", 
                      showgrid = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(title = "", automargin = TRUE, gridcolor = light_grey),
         font = plot_font, margin = list(l = 230, r = 30, t = 70, b = 60))
```

Row {data-height=500}
-------------------------------------------------------------

### Top Customers by Spending

```{r}
customer_plot <- top_customers %>%  arrange(total_spending)

plot_ly(customer_plot, x = ~total_spending, 
        y = ~reorder(customer_id, total_spending),
        type = "bar", orientation = "h", 
        marker = list(color = coral, line = list(color = "white", width = 1)),
        text = ~paste0("<b>Customer ID:</b> ", customer_id,
                       "<br><b>Total spending:</b> £",
                       format(round(total_spending, 2),big.mark = ",")),
        hoverinfo = "text", textposition = "none", showlegend = FALSE) %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
         title = list(text = "<b>Top Customers by Spending</b>", x = 0.5),
         xaxis = list(title = "Total Spending (£)", tickformat = ",.0f",
                      showgrid = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(title = "Customer ID", automargin = TRUE, 
                      gridcolor = light_grey), font = plot_font,
         margin = list(l = 100, r = 30, t = 70, b = 60))
```

### Top Countries by Revenue

```{r}
country_plot <- country_revenue %>% arrange(total_revenue)

plot_ly(country_plot, x = ~total_revenue, y = ~reorder(country, total_revenue),
        type = "bar", orientation = "h", 
        marker = list(color = blue, line = list(color = "white", width = 1)),
        text = ~paste0("<b>Country:</b> ", country,
                       "<br><b>Total revenue:</b> £",
                       format(round(total_revenue, 2), big.mark = ",")),
        hoverinfo = "text", textposition = "none", showlegend = FALSE) %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
         title = list(text = "<b>Top Countries by Revenue</b>", x = 0.5),
         xaxis = list(title = "Revenue (£)", tickformat = ",.0f", 
                      showgrid = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(title = "", automargin = TRUE, gridcolor = light_grey),
         font = plot_font, margin = list(l = 130, r = 30, t = 70, b = 60))
```
